task_description: Upgrade #4: Enhanced RAG Pipeline + File Upload for Knowledge Base

verification.summary: All new Python files import successfully. Existing interfaces still importable. DocumentLoader parses text/csv/json/code files. RAGEngine retrieves and formats context. Upload endpoint validates size and format. Embeddings support TF-IDF (default) with sentence-transformers optional upgrade. Orchestrator injects RAG context in both streaming and non-streaming paths.
